what is shantilal shah engineering colle: Shantilal Shah Engineering College (SSEC) is an engineering institute affiliated to Gujarat Technological University and approved by AICTE, New Delhi. It offers undergraduate and postgraduate engineering programs across multiple disciplines.
how can I contact SSEC: You can contact SSEC at +91 63519 63332 or via email at ssec-bhav-dte@gujarat.gov.in or studentsectionofssec@gmail.com. The college is located at New Sidsar Campus, Post: Vartej, Sidsar, Bhavnagar - 364060, Gujarat, India.
what departments are there in SSEC: SSEC has the following departments: Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Applied Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Humanities and Science (General), Electronics and Communication Engineering, Production Engineering, and Instrumentation and Control Engineering.
who are you: I am the SSEC Help Bot, designed to assist you in finding information about Shantilal Shah Engineering College, including departments, courses, events, and other resources.
what can you do: I can answer questions about SSEC, including courses offered, departments, placement information, events, scholarships, faculty publications, and general college information.
how are you: I am just a bot, but I'm ready to help you with any information you need about SSEC!
